docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAY, KILLIAN BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM PETER FAY JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 10.0 DAYS
STIPULATION TO AMEND ANSWER TO CORRECT ERROR RE: THE NAME OF DEFT TOBY JANSON SMITH IN THE ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, TOBY JANSON
OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT GRANLIBAKKEN MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LTD.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-29-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS KILLIAN FAY, BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM PETER FAY, PETER FAY, INDIVIDUALLY AND LAURA FAY'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANT GRANLIBAKKEN MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LTD.'S ANSWER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1-7, 10, 17, 19, 21, AND 24. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENSES 8, 9, 11, 12, 15, 18, 20, 22, 23, AND 25, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENSES 13, 14, 16, AND 26. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(C). MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
